# barracudawaf_geo_pool (Resource)

`barracudawaf_geo_pool` manages `GEO Pool` on the Barracuda Web Application Firewall.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "barracudawaf_geo_pool" "test_geo" {
    name = "test_terraform_geo"
    region = "Asia"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- **name** (String) Geo Pool Name

### Optional

- **region** (String) Available Categories
